taxonomy_applicability.rationale: Named cross-record references in the data files may resolve to no declared record.
Outfits and cargo may require a valid producer in ship, fleet, or event data.
Systems and mission destinations are connected by routes whose targets may be unreachable.
Mission and condition dependencies may form cycles.
Mission offer conditions and locations may make a mission impossible to start.
Mission completion conditions may be mutually unsatisfiable.
Mission and event rewards use numeric values that can violate declared design bounds.
The registered random-choice weights are not probability vectors required to sum to one.
The registered data surface has no ordered progression-curve contract.
The source has no gacha or pity system.
This B0A source surface does not define a closed player economy with source-and-sink balance.
Mission dialogue and descriptions contain recurring named characters.
Mission text can reveal future events before their gating conditions are met.
Mission and dialogue content is scoped to named factions and relationships.
Named missions and content records have source-level uniqueness requirements.
